cards.rules_text:
Rules of Clearingsong
- The world is full of beautiful variety
- Evil exists but it can be beaten
- Friendship takes all kinds
- This is not a world of warriors
- The elders are hidebound and silly but the children can work together
- Everything has detail and texture
- No mammals
Principles of design
- Elegance. Find the elegant cards that haven't been made
- Friendliness. Don't play with fire.
- Diversity. Each card encourages you to play other, different cards.
cards.notes:

- The world is full of beautiful variety
- Evil exists but it can be beaten
- Friendship takes all kinds
- This is not a world of warriors
- The elders are hidebound and silly but the children can work together

Principles of design
- Elegance. Find the elegant cards that haven't been made
- Friendliness. Don't play with fire.
- Diversity. Each card encourages you to play other, different cards.
